name: TestGetWaitLinETFSingleResponseData
title: TestGetWaitLinETFSingleResponseData
description: If LIN Event-triggered frame with a single response for the specified associated frame is the last event that triggers a wait instruction, the event content can be called up with this function.
When the triggering event is a part of a wait instruction for joined events, the index parameter has to correspond to the return value of "testJoin..." function.

parameters.name: apEvent
parameters.description: Event variable that is filled with current data from the bus.
